doc.hardware: HD TV plus optional gamepad screen
doc.intent: No default CRT; only use TV/gamepad bezel when both regions are exposed.
doc.bios: Cemu needs user-supplied Wii U keys for encrypted content. The dir mirrors the manifest/doctor Cemu profile location (manifest.btrc:601, doctor.btrc Cemu/data); there is no bios/wiiu drop dir today.
